View this page

classes¶

Data classes, enumerations, and exceptions used throughout automagician.

class automagician.classes.SSHConfig(config: "Literal['NoSSH']")[source]¶

Bases: object

class automagician.classes.JobStatus(*values)[source]¶

Bases: IntEnum

An enum storing the status of a job

Converged = 0 Incomplete = 1 Error = 2 Running = -1 NotFound = -10

class automagician.classes.Machine(*values)[source]¶

Bases: IntEnum

class automagician.classes.OptJob(status, home_machine, last_on)[source]¶

Bases: object

A class to represent an optimization job.

status¶

Current convergence/running status of the job.

Type:

automagician.classes.JobStatus

home_machine¶

The machine where this job was originally registered.

Type:

automagician.classes.Machine

last_on¶

The machine this job was most recently run on.

Type:

automagician.classes.Machine

class automagician.classes.DosJob(opt_id, sc_status, dos_status, sc_last_on, dos_last_on)[source]¶

Bases: object

A density-of-states job, composed of an SC step followed by a DOS step.

opt_id¶

Row ID of the parent optimisation job in the database.

Type:

int | Literal[-1]

sc_status¶

Status of the self-consistent (SC) charge-density calculation.

Type:

automagician.classes.JobStatus

dos_status¶

Status of the density-of-states calculation.

Type:

automagician.classes.JobStatus

sc_last_on¶

Machine the SC calculation was most recently run on.

Type:

automagician.classes.Machine

dos_last_on¶

Machine the DOS calculation was most recently run on.

Type:

automagician.classes.Machine

class automagician.classes.WavJob(opt_id, wav_status, wav_last_on)[source]¶

Bases: object

A job run specifically to obtain a WAVECAR file.

opt_id¶

Row ID of the parent optimisation job in the database.

Type:

int | Literal[-1]

wav_status¶

Status of the WAVECAR calculation (see JobStatus).

Type:

automagician.classes.JobStatus

wav_last_on¶

Machine the WAVECAR calculation was most recently run on.

Type:

automagician.classes.Machine

class automagician.classes.GoneJob(old_dir, status, home_machine, last_on)[source]¶

Bases: object

A record of jobs that can no longer be found

exception automagician.classes.JobLimitError[source]¶

Bases: Exception

What happens if you submit too many jobs
